title: [SBW] TracerFire
description: Addon tracer fire in Superb Warfare
body:
Greetings, I made this mod as an addon for the Superb Warfare mod, I made it and tested it on SBW version 0.8.7.1, I wanted to make it beautiful, but unfortunately bullets fly instantly, so it turned out to be a bit 50/50, but I hope you like it =)

Demo Video
